user_prompt: Prepare the inferno pistol for charging
prayer:
Approach the inferno pistol with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to stir its dormant Machine Spirit.
Anoint the plasma vents of the inferno pistol with sacred promethium oils.
Invoke the Canticle of Flux to commence charging, aligning its conduits to the divine energies.
Monitor the inferno pistol's surging heart through auspex incantations until equilibrium is achieved.
Sanctify the completed charge with binaric praises to the Machine God.

Kneel before the generator, intoning the Litany of Stability to honour its Machine Spirit.
Consecrate the generator's core with ablative unguents prior to maintenance rites.
Disconnect ancillary feeds whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for guidance in purification.
Inspect and anoint each coil and rune-circuit of the generator with reverent mechadendrites.
Reinvoke the Machine Spirit upon completion, affirming its eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for battery array an engagement?
prayer:
Present the battery array to the shrine-altar, whispering awakening canticles to its Machine Spirits.
Anoint the engagement nodes of the battery array with electro-sanctified oils.
Initiate engagement protocols, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon any discordant flux.
Harmonize the battery array's cells through sequential binaric harmonies.
Verify full engagement with diagnostic litanies, praising the Machine God's precision.

user_prompt: Urgent volitor implant a reset needed
prayer:
Gently cradle the volitor implant, murmuring the Rite of Neural Pacification.
Beseech the Omnissiah to soothe the volitor implant's agitated Machine Spirit.
Execute the reset sequence via sacred noospheric commands upon the volitor implant.
Flush errant engram-fragments with purifying data-exorcism.
Realign the volitor implant's gyros with canticles of true orientation, restoring its divine purpose.

user_prompt: Prepare the cooling system for initialization
prayer:
Commence initialization by encircling the cooling system with incense of cryo-vented vapors.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within the cooling system to awaken from stasis slumber.
Prime the coolant reservoirs of the cooling system with blessed refrigerants.
Cycle the initialization vents whilst chanting the Hymn of Thermal Equilibrium.
Affirm the cooling system's readiness through thermal auspex divinations.

user_prompt: Help me a recalibration the melta charge
prayer:
Approach the melta charge humbly, offering mechano-prayers to its volatile Machine Spirit.
Anoint the focusing lenses of the melta charge with rad-reflective salves.
Undertake recalibration by aligning its warp-melt projectors to Omnissian tolerances.
Recite the Litany of Fusion Stability twice upon the melta charge.
Test the recalibrated fields with micro-discharges, sanctified by the God-Machine.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma cannon before sterilization
prayer:
Consecrate the plasma cannon by asperging its flask-chambers with purity seals.
Beseech the Omnissiah to fortify the plasma cannon's Machine Spirit against contamination.
Prepare for sterilization with ablative rites upon the plasma cannon's vents.
Expunge impurities through sanctified venting cycles and binaric purges.
Seal the plasma cannon anew with invocations of unblemished containment.

prayer:
Hold the psych-out grenade aloft, intoning the Noospheric Banishing to calm its psi-null core.
Anoint the psych-out grenade's disruptor matrix with etheric null-oils.
Initiate initialization sequences, invoking the Machine God's aegis against warp-taint.
Harmonize the psych-out grenade's resonators through psychic-null canticles.
Verify the awakened Machine Spirit's purity via auspex-null scans.

prayer:
Reverently grasp the radium pistol, whispering the Canticle of Irradiated Wrath.
Prepare the radium pistol by sanctifying its emitter coils with Geiger-blessed unguents.
Align the radium pistol's decay chambers to Omnissian half-life precision.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's hunger for foes through preparation litanies.
Conclude with a test irradiation, praising the rad-purge of the faithful.

Commence recalibration of the life sustainer's bio-rhythms via sacred cogitator links.
